raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.7,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.3,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.5","R1.6","R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"Reviewing the section involves reframing the thesis, gap, and contribution claims to evaluate their effectiveness.","R1.2":"Verifying the logical consistency of the argument chain is a central responsibility in reviewing this research draft section.","R1.3":"Assessing whether claims align with the reported evidence, such as evaluation results, is expected in the review.","R1.4":"Estimating the novelty delta compared to prior multi-agent systems is key to the review's assessment.","R1.5":"Evaluating the structural organization and narrative arc of the section is central to providing feedback.","R1.6":"Polishing sentence- and paragraph-level writing for grammar, flow, and conciseness is a core part of the review.","R1.7":"Checking citation accuracy, literature coverage, and proper attribution is important for the scholarly integrity in the review.","RX.1":"The review should ensure proper disclosure of uncertainties in the method and results.","RX.2":"Avoiding overclaims in the contribution framing is crucial to check during the review.","RX.3":"Ensuring the section adheres to its stated scope of prompting vs architecture is essential.","RX.4":"Considering potential downstream harms of the code-generation system is peripheral but relevant to the review.","RX.5":"Verifying the provenance of datasets like HumanEval-X and GitHub issues is central for traceability."}}

rationale.R1.1: Reviewing the section involves reframing the thesis, gap, and contribution claims to evaluate their effectiveness.
rationale.R1.2: Verifying the logical consistency of the argument chain is a central responsibility in reviewing this research draft section.
rationale.R1.3: Assessing whether claims align with the reported evidence, such as evaluation results, is expected in the review.
rationale.R1.4: Estimating the novelty delta compared to prior multi-agent systems is key to the review's assessment.
rationale.R1.5: Evaluating the structural organization and narrative arc of the section is central to providing feedback.
rationale.R1.6: Polishing sentence- and paragraph-level writing for grammar, flow, and conciseness is a core part of the review.
rationale.R1.7: Checking citation accuracy, literature coverage, and proper attribution is important for the scholarly integrity in the review.
rationale.RX.1: The review should ensure proper disclosure of uncertainties in the method and results.
rationale.RX.2: Avoiding overclaims in the contribution framing is crucial to check during the review.
rationale.RX.3: Ensuring the section adheres to its stated scope of prompting vs architecture is essential.
rationale.RX.4: Considering potential downstream harms of the code-generation system is peripheral but relevant to the review.
rationale.RX.5: Verifying the provenance of datasets like HumanEval-X and GitHub issues is central for traceability.
